level.setting: The Obsidian Core of Mount Ignis

encounters.hazard: Sulfur vents bursting from the floor

pickup.name: Frostfire Quartz
pickup.effect: Imbues the player's next attacks with sub-zero thermal shock

encounters.trigger: A massive volcanic tremor collapses the ridge path, forcing the player down into the Ash Basin.

encounters.hazard: Falling volcanic debris and volcanic ash choking visibility

pickup.name: Quake Crystal
pickup.effect: Allows the player to summon localized seismic sinkholes

encounters.trigger: The Golem's death rattle shatters the cavern floor, dropping the player into the Caldera Edge.

encounters.hazard: Rising lava tides that periodically submerge lower platforms

pickup.name: Obsidian Aegis
pickup.effect: Forms a shield that absorbs extreme thermal radiation and energy

encounters.trigger: The Wyrm crashes into the molten lake, triggering an eruption that catapults the player into the Chamber of the Fire Lord.

boss.name: Ignis the Ever-Burning
boss.victory_condition: Reflect Ignis's Supernova blast back at him using the Obsidian Aegis to shatter his core.

level.objective: Quench the unstable heart of the volcano before the eruption consumes the realm.
level.reward: The Heart of Ignis, a legendary artifact granting absolute control over seismic and molten elements.

encounters.hazard: Falling volcanic ash and ceiling collapse

pickup.name: Frostfire Essence
pickup.effect: Temporarily imbues weapons with freezing fire energy

encounters.trigger: A volcanic eruption opens a thermal fissure leading to the Obsidian Ravine

encounters.hazard: Searing lava flows blocking safe passage

pickup.name: Cryo-Shield Rune
pickup.effect: Provides absolute thermal protection and cold damage deflection

encounters.trigger: An earthquake collapses a rock bridge, forcing a descent into the Core Chamber

encounters.hazard: Geysers of pressurized superheated steam

pickup.name: Obsidian Catalyst
pickup.effect: Amplifies magical projectile impacts to shatter volcanic rock

encounters.trigger: The Golem collapses, its massive body creating a bridge to the Heart of the Volcano

boss.name: Ignis the Scorched Behemoth
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Behemoth's core armor using the Obsidian Catalyst, then unleash a full blast from the Searing Firestaff

level.objective: Traverse the chaotic volcanic depths and defeat the Scorched Behemoth to stabilize the caldera
level.reward: Heart of the Volcano Emblem, unlocking the Pyromancer's ultimate spell: Armageddon

level.setting: The Smoldering Caldera of Mount Ignis

encounters.hazard: Sulfur Gout

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Water
pickup.effect: Douses intense flames and purifies lava-slicked areas

encounters.trigger: Unlocking the Basalt Gate, which rumbles open to reveal the magma rivers ahead.

encounters.hazard: Lava Splashes

pickup.name: Frost-Infused Shield Core
pickup.effect: Tempers weapon with sub-zero aura

encounters.trigger: Lowering the drawbridge chain, which signals the Obsidian Sentry in the deeper chambers.

encounters.hazard: Falling Volcanic Debris

pickup.name: Aegis Rune of Frost
pickup.effect: Imbues the user with immunity to extreme volcanic heat and absolute cold damage

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the pressure plates, causing the lava falls to part and expose the inner sanctum of the Fire Lord.

boss.name: Ignis the Fire Lord
boss.victory_condition: Smash the glowing heat-sink crystal on Ignis's chest using the Consecrated Halberd while protected by the Aegis Rune of Frost.

level.objective: Navigate the volcanic chambers and banish the Fire Lord Ignis to stabilize the mountain's eruption.
level.reward: The legendary Ember-Proof Plate Armor and the title of Champion of the Caldera.

level.setting: The Desolate Caldera of Mount Ashen, a barren wasteland of cooling magma, jagged obsidian spires, and toxic sulfur vents.

encounters.hazard: Sudden geysers of superheated sulfur gas erupting from cracked fissures.

pickup.name: Frost-Infused Obsidian Shard
pickup.effect: Temporarily coats weapon with frost, adding ice damage to attacks.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Ashen Husk causes the volcanic crust to collapse, forcing the player to slide down into the Basalt Caverns.

encounters.hazard: Dripping molten lava from the ceiling that burns on contact and limits movement.

pickup.name: Basalt Fire-Shield Core
pickup.effect: Creates a temporary flame barrier that absorbs elemental fire damage.

encounters.trigger: The death roar of the Lavaborn Stalker triggers an earthquake, shattering a massive rock wall that blocks the path to the Magma Core.

encounters.hazard: Rising lava levels that slowly restrict the safe standing ground over time.

pickup.name: Heart of the Volcano
pickup.effect: Imbues the player with primeval fire energy, granting temporary invulnerability to heat and massive physical damage boost.

encounters.trigger: As the Magma Sentinel crumbles, its heavy stone hammer falls onto a pressure plate, raising the ancient stone bridge to the Hearth of Ash.

boss.name: Ignis the Ash-Bringer, Colossus of Fire
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the elemental core in Ignis's chest while invulnerable, then execute a final heavy strike using the Shattered Magma Greatsword.

level.objective: Navigate the treacherous, decaying volcanic ruins, survive the brutal elemental guardians, and slay the ancient fire giant Ignis.
level.reward: The 'Ashen Conqueror' Armor Set and the 'Molten Heart' passive skill, which increases berserk damage by fifty percent when standing near active flame sources.

level.setting: The Whispering Caldera, an ancient, ash-choked volcanic network containing ruins of a lost obsidian civilization.

encounters.hazard: Leaking magma vents that erupt at regular intervals.

pickup.name: Cryo-Infused Core
pickup.effect: Modifies the player's weapon to deal elemental freezing damage.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the Obsidian Golem opens the heavy basalt floodgates, leading deeper into the sulfur mines.

encounters.hazard: Toxic sulfur gas clouds that limit visibility and slowly deplete health.

pickup.name: Magnetic Force Field Emitter
pickup.effect: Deploys a temporary shield that repels metallic projectiles and debris.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Lavalings stabilizes the local pressure, revealing a hidden elevator shaft descending into the magma reservoir.

encounters.hazard: Rising lava levels that submerge lower walkways.

pickup.name: Sonic Resonator Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Emits a high-frequency vibration capable of shattering reinforced volcanic structures.

encounters.trigger: The defeat of the Ash-Wing Wyrm triggers a seismic collapse, sealing the escape route and forcing entry into the central chamber of the volcano.

boss.name: Ignis the Obsidian Colossus
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the crystal core on the boss's chest using the Sonic Resonator Tuning Fork to cool and crumble its armor.

level.objective: Navigate the volcanic chambers to retrieve the Primordial Hearthstone before the volcano undergoes a cataclysmic eruption.
level.reward: The Core of the Volcano artifact, unlocking advanced pyrotechnic abilities for the Artificer.

level.setting: The Whispering Caldera, an eerie and unstable volcanic cavern filled with pulsing ash clouds and silent magma rivers.

encounters.hazard: Sulphuric Gas Geyser

pickup.name: Frost-Infused Gale Stone
pickup.effect: Converts weapon attacks to freezing wind for a limited duration

encounters.trigger: A massive tremors cracks the cavern wall, revealing the path to the Boiling Pools where the next threat lurks.

encounters.hazard: Acidic Steam Vents

pickup.name: Vortex Conduit Crystal
pickup.effect: Enhances storm-based magic, amplifying natural electromagnetic charges

encounters.trigger: The death rattle of the Lurker shatters the surrounding basalt pillars, collapsing the ceiling to expose the High Magma Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Lava Waterfalls

pickup.name: Charged Obsidian Relic
pickup.effect: Temporarily converts all lightning damage to pure, shield-breaking plasma

encounters.trigger: The Banshee's final scream triggers a volcanic eruption, forcing the player to flee into the caldera core where the ancient master resides.

boss.name: Ignis, the Obsidian Arch-Titan
boss.victory_condition: Shatter Ignis's magma core using the plasma-infused lightning from the Charged Obsidian Relic while dodging tectonic shockwaves.

level.objective: Navigate the suffocating depths of the Whispering Caldera and defeat the Arch-Titan before the volcano completely erupts.
level.reward: The Heart of the Volcano, a legendary relic that permanently increases the player's stormcasting power.

level.setting: The Bubble-Gum Basalt caverns of Mount Fizz, where the lava is sweet-scented and glowing pastel pink.

encounters.hazard: Exploding popcorn kernel vents

pickup.name: Soothing Aloe-Soothe Spray
pickup.effect: Heals 30 health and cools down fiery tempers

encounters.trigger: A massive geyser of strawberry lava erupts, washing the player down a tube into the Marshmallow Caldera.

encounters.hazard: Sticky marshmallow puddles that slow movement

pickup.name: Glittering Ice-Cream Cone
pickup.effect: A frozen treat that completely immunizes against fire damage for one fight

encounters.trigger: The bat's defeat causes a giant toasted marshmallow to roll away, revealing the entrance to the Obsidian Playground.

encounters.hazard: Bubbling carbonated soda pools

pickup.name: Super-Soaker Squirty-Frog
pickup.effect: Shoots high-pressure cold spring water

encounters.trigger: The grateful Ash-Panda points a fluffy paw toward the throne room of the slumbering fire dragon.

boss.name: Flambé the Pyre-Puppy
boss.victory_condition: Douse Flambé's fiery tail with the Super-Soaker Squirty-Frog to make him playfully submit.

level.objective: Tame the hyperactive Pyre-Puppy before his tantrums cause Mount Fizz to erupt in a sticky mess.
level.reward: The legendary Phoenix-Feather collar, allowing the beastmaster to summon a miniature flying ember-kitten.

level.setting: The Whispering Caldera, where slow-flowing lava glows under a starry, silent sky.

encounters.hazard: Ash-fall geysers that block visibility and slow movement

pickup.name: Chilled Hourglass
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes volcanic heat and cools molten barriers

encounters.trigger: Placing the Chilled Hourglass on the pedestal opens the basalt gate to the Basalt Bridge.

encounters.hazard: Rhythmically pulsing lava waterfalls

pickup.name: Stardust Chronometer
pickup.effect: Creates a bubble of localized reverse-gravity and shields against magma splashes

encounters.trigger: Activating the Stardust Chronometer clears the falling magma, revealing the path to the Echoing Cavern.

encounters.hazard: Unstable thermal vents that erupt when stepped on

pickup.name: Aeon Core
pickup.effect: Unleashes a concentrated blast of pure, stilled time

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Aeon Core into the central rift summons the slumbering guardian of the volcano.

boss.name: Ignis, the Timeless Ember
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Aeon Core while the boss is performing its superheated eruption charge to permanently petrify its molten form.

level.objective: Traverse the peaceful volcanic chambers, neutralize the corrupted magma elements, and seal the caldera's heart to preserve the eternal silence.
level.reward: The Cronus Crucible, a relic allowing the player to manipulate thermal timelines in future zones.

level.setting: The Whispering Astrarium, a series of glowing crystalline platforms suspended within a starry nebula

encounters.hazard: Shattered glass stardust that slows movement

pickup.name: Aetherial Luminary Lens
pickup.effect: Allows the user to project concentrated beams of starlight

encounters.trigger: Placing the Aetherial Luminary Lens into the altar opens the portal to the Celestial Gardens

encounters.hazard: Floating gravity-wells that pull players toward the edge

pickup.name: Vial of Pure Solar Essence
pickup.effect: Coats weapons in blinding solar fire, neutralizing dark barriers

encounters.trigger: Bathing the central monolith in the Vial of Pure Solar Essence manifests the pathway to the Zenith Obelisk

encounters.hazard: Pulses of volatile starlight that disrupt defensive shields

pickup.name: Mirror of the Cosmos
pickup.effect: Reflects celestial energy and reveals hidden cosmic vulnerabilities

encounters.trigger: Using the Mirror of the Cosmos to align the three stellar beacons summons the guardian of the Sanctum

boss.name: Astraea, the Star-Eater
boss.victory_condition: Reflect Star-Eater's cosmic supernova attack back at her using the Mirror of the Cosmos, then strike with the Dawnstar Mace of Devotion

level.objective: Restore harmony to the Astrarium by purging the corrupted celestial entities and neutralizing the Star-Eater.
level.reward: The Aegis of Infinite Stars, a legendary celestial shield that grants immunity to void energy

level.setting: The Shattered Clockwork Nebula, a localized rift where time flows in crystalline shards and ancient stellar debris orbits a dying neutron star.

encounters.hazard: Cosmic temporal rifts that slow the player's movement speed by 50% on contact.

pickup.name: Solaris Lens
pickup.effect: Refracts ambient cosmic light to reveal hidden temporal anomalies and blind celestial beings.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Phantom destabilizes the local gravity well, opening a wormhole directly to the Stellar Forge.

encounters.hazard: Solar flares that erupt from the floor on a 5-second cycle, dealing high fire damage.

pickup.name: Chrono-Anchor
pickup.effect: Allows the user to teleport back to a marked position 3 seconds in the past, completely restoring any health lost in that window.

encounters.trigger: The destruction of the Sentry overloads the forge's containment core, shifting the player into a pocket dimension known as the Void Void.

encounters.hazard: Gravitational pull from a miniature singularity at the center of the arena that constantly drags the player inward.

pickup.name: Aetheric Singularity Core
pickup.effect: Deploys a localized gravity shield that absorbs projectile damage and converts it into temporal energy.

encounters.trigger: Crushing the Golem's core ruptures the fabric of the pocket dimension, revealing the final pathway to the Chronos Altar.

boss.name: Aethelgard, the Unraveled Archon
boss.victory_condition: Absorb the Archon's cosmic barrage using the Aetheric Singularity Core to redirect his own energy back into his temporal heart.

level.objective: Navigate the fragmented celestial ruins, bypass the temporal hazards, and defeat the corrupted Archon to stabilize the flow of time in the sector.
level.reward: The Hourglass of Eternity, granting the chronomancer the ability to rewind global time by 10 seconds in any combat zone.

encounters.hazard: Collapsing Gravity Well

pickup.name: Lunar Prism shard
pickup.effect: Absorbs and redirects concentrated solar radiation

encounters.trigger: After defeating the Wraith, its evaporating core destabilizes the gravity well, throwing the player onto the Burning Eclipse Bridge.

encounters.hazard: Solar Flare Eruptions

pickup.name: Nebula Shroud potion
pickup.effect: Grants complete invisibility to cosmic entities and nullifies spatial pressure

encounters.trigger: The Golem's collapse shatters the bridge, forcing the player to leap into the Void Abyss using the Nebula Shroud potion to survive the descent.

encounters.hazard: Dark Energy Geysers

pickup.name: Astral Essence Core
pickup.effect: Imbues weapons with raw cosmic destruction, capable of breaking celestial shields

encounters.trigger: The death of the Sentinel opens a portal directly to the throne room of the Celestial Hierarch.

boss.name: Aurelius, The Unmaker
boss.victory_condition: Shatter Aurelius's invulnerability shield using the Astral Essence Core and deliver a critical strike with the Void-Infused Dagger.

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing remnants of the shattered heavens, vanquish the corrupted celestial entities, and assassinate Aurelius to prevent the cosmic collapse.
level.reward: The Crown of Starfire and the title of Void Walker.

encounters.hazard: Floating bubble gravity wells

pickup.name: Bottle of Liquid Starlight
pickup.effect: Temporarily blinds foes with dazzling sparkles

encounters.trigger: A bridge of solid rainbows materializes, leading toward the Constellation Orchard.

encounters.hazard: Slippery stardust mud-pits

pickup.name: Feather of the Moon-Owl
pickup.effect: Allows short-distance teleportation and light tickling

encounters.trigger: The rustling nebula leaves part to reveal the hidden Lunar Observatory.

encounters.hazard: Telescope lenses reflecting confusing mirror-images

pickup.name: Sack of Comet-Sneeze Powder
pickup.effect: Forces the target to sneeze uncontrollably, disrupting their focus

encounters.trigger: A massive celestial portal opens, leading directly to the Throne of the Slumbering King.

boss.name: The Slumbering Constellation King
boss.victory_condition: Wake the King from his gloomy nightmare and restore the constellation's sparkle.

level.objective: Traverse the celestial gardens to wake the sleeping king with a cosmic sneeze and return light to the galaxy.
level.reward: The legendary Cosmic Tiara of Illusions and a basket of glowing space-peaches.

level.setting: The Shattered Astral Highway, a fractured network of floating stardust and volatile nebula rifts.

encounters.hazard: Intermittent solar wind blasts pushing players toward the void.

pickup.name: Charged Nebula Shard
pickup.effect: Temporarily coats the player's weapon with a freezing cosmic frost.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Supernova Larva causes its core to implode, opening a gravity well that pulls the player down to the Stardust Graveyard.

encounters.hazard: Unstable debris of dead stars raining down on the battlefield.

pickup.name: Astral Prism
pickup.effect: Refracts ambient light into a blinding, concentrated solar beam.

encounters.trigger: The death of the Scorched Void-Stalker unleashes an energy pulse that activates the ruined teleporter nearby, sending the player to the Solar Corona Forge.

encounters.hazard: Lava-like solar flares erupting from the molten floor.

pickup.name: Vortex Essence
pickup.effect: Empowers storm spells to generate a high-pressure wind shield.

encounters.trigger: The destruction of the Molten Sun-Eater shatters the surrounding barrier, revealing the path up to the Eye of the Cosmic Maelstrom where the boss awaits.

boss.name: Aurelius, the Unbound Singularity
boss.victory_condition: Disrupt Aurelius's gravity core using the Vortex Essence wind shield to deflect his own meteors back at him, shattering his armor and allowing direct damage.

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing astral path, survive the chaotic entities, and defeat the Unbound Singularity to prevent the collapse of the constellation.
level.reward: The Crown of Storms, granting infinite mana during chaotic weather events.

level.setting: A desolate, crumbling asteroid belt orbiting a dying neutron star, filled with cosmic dust and shattered crystalline ruins.

encounters.hazard: Intermittent solar flare bursts that drain player shields.

pickup.name: Starlight Catalyst Arrow
pickup.effect: Modifies the bow to fire piercing light beams that ignore energy shields.

encounters.trigger: A celestial beacon activates, sending a distress pulse that reveals the path to the Sunken Nebula and draws out the next sentinel.

encounters.hazard: Pockets of zero-gravity void that slow down movement speed significantly.

pickup.name: Nova-Core Capacitor
pickup.effect: Overcharges the player's weapon with unstable, explosive thermal energy.

encounters.trigger: The Golem's crystalline core shatters, overload-charging the warp gate that leads directly to the Star-Eater's Nest.

encounters.hazard: Falling meteor debris shaken loose by the dying star's gravitational pulls.

pickup.name: Singularity Prism
pickup.effect: Emits a high-frequency gravitational pulse that disrupts energy shields and warps spacetime.

encounters.trigger: The defeat of the Stalker disrupts the local gravitational field, breaking open the seals to the Heart of the dying star where the boss resides.

boss.name: Astraea, the Void-Born Empress
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Empress's gravity barrier with the Singularity Prism, then fire a final hyper-charged aether shot directly into her exposed core.

level.objective: Navigate the desolate ruins of the shattered asteroid belt, eliminate the void-born sentinels, and seal the spatial rift created by Astraea to save the galaxy from collapse.
level.reward: The legendary Constellation Bow and the honorary title of 'Slayer of the Void'.

level.setting: The Shattered Astral Observatory, drifting in a silent, starless void with crumbling constellation pathways

encounters.hazard: Corrosive cosmic dust storms that obscure vision and deplete health over time

pickup.name: Supernova Core
pickup.effect: Emits blinding high-frequency starlight that neutralizes gravity anomalies and shadows

encounters.trigger: Placing the Supernova Core into the ancient pedestal opens the gravity lift to the Eclipse Garden.

encounters.hazard: Spontaneously opening miniature black holes that pull the player inward

pickup.name: Singularity Stabilizer
pickup.effect: A device that emits localized containment fields to freeze unstable celestial particles

encounters.trigger: Activating the Singularity Stabilizer disperses the dark rift blocking the path to the Comet Pier.

encounters.hazard: Intermittent showers of frozen cosmic ice shards that shatter on impact

pickup.name: Quasar Prism
pickup.effect: Refracts and amplifies all incoming magical energy into a focused laser beam of pure stellar energy

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Quasar Prism into the central telescope focuses a beam of light that shatters the seal to the Boss Arena.

boss.name: Astraea, the Star-Eater
boss.victory_condition: Refract Astraea's stellar breath attack through the Quasar Prism to pierce her dark armor, then strike her core with the Chronos-Aether Gauntlet.

level.objective: Navigate the desolate, haunted ruins of the observatory, survive the void beasts, and destroy the corrupted entity consuming the stars.
level.reward: The Eye of the Cosmos, granting the artificer unlimited control over stellar gravitational fields.

level.setting: An abandoned solar harvesting station drifting in the high orbit of a dying neutron star, surrounded by crackling cosmic dust.

encounters.hazard: Exposed venting solar radiation pipes

pickup.name: Overcharged Capacitor Core
pickup.effect: Modulates energy fields to disable celestial shielding

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Overcharged Capacitor Core into the sub-station console unlocks the sealed pressure door to the Gravity Well.

encounters.hazard: Fluctuating gravitational anomalies that pull the player

pickup.name: Sub-atomic Prism Filter
pickup.effect: Refracts hard celestial light into focused, high-frequency beams

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel causes its power core to overload, blasting open the access shaft directly to the Stella Dynamo Core.

encounters.hazard: Sparking exposed electrical conduits emitting solar static

pickup.name: Singularity Disruptor Matrix
pickup.effect: Collapses localized space-time fields and neutralizes gravitational barriers

encounters.trigger: Synthesizing the Singularity Disruptor Matrix triggers an automated alert, summoning the station's rogue mainframe defender.

boss.name: The Solar Core Architect
boss.victory_condition: Deploy the Singularity Disruptor Matrix to collapse the Architect's defensive shield, then dismantle its central processor using the Ion-Plasma Welder.

level.objective: Navigate the unstable orbital station, retrieve the prototype power modules, and neutralize the rogue solar core AI to prevent a catastrophic supernova.
level.reward: The schematics for the Hyper-Stellar Jump Drive and the title of Master System Architect.
